name: Previewer Toolkit
description: OG image generator with 52 professional templates across 10 categories, plus a live metadata inspector. Generate social-ready images for Open Graph, Twitter Cards, Discord, LinkedIn and more — entirely from URL parameters.
author: Shamrouz Awan

meta.title: Previewer Toolkit — OG Image Generator & Metadata Inspector
meta.description: Generate professional Open Graph images, Twitter cards, social previews and more from URL parameters. Inspect any URL's metadata, og:image, and social sharing tags instantly.
